name: Japan
hero: Translate Japanese menus, signs, train notices, and everyday conversations with a travel app built for Japan.
intro: Japan is one of WanderVox's strongest travel use cases: local scripts, detailed food culture, train signage, and etiquette all matter. WanderVox keeps translation, culture, emergency basics, and trip context in one place.
highlights: Translate Japanese speech, menus, signs, and transit notices
Hear key phrases spoken aloud before showing them to locals
Use cultural tips for restaurants, temples, trains, and public manners
useCases: Ordering from an izakaya menu or handwritten special board
Asking station staff for the right platform or ticket gate
Checking etiquette before visiting temples, ryokan, or local restaurants
phrases: ありがとうございます
このホームはどこですか？
食物アレルギーがあります
metaTitle: Japan Travel Translator App | Japanese Voice, Menu & Sign Translation
metaDescription: Use WanderVox in Japan to translate Japanese speech, menus, signs, train notices, and travel phrases with camera translation, audio, and cultural tips.

name: Thailand
hero: Translate Thai speech, street food menus, signs, and travel questions with context for real trips in Thailand.
intro: Thailand combines a non-Latin script, street food culture, local transport, and etiquette that can be difficult to handle with generic translation alone. WanderVox gives travelers a practical translation and culture layer.
highlights: Translate Thai script on menus, signs, and notices
Use voice translation for markets, taxis, hotels, and restaurants
Check cultural tips for temples, greetings, bargaining, and food etiquette
useCases: Reading street food menus and ingredient notes
Showing a taxi card or translated destination
Asking about spice levels, allergies, or directions
phrases: สวัสดีครับ/ค่ะ
ไม่เผ็ดครับ/ค่ะ
อันนี้ราคาเท่าไหร่ครับ/คะ
metaTitle: Thailand Travel Translator App | Thai Voice, Menu & Sign Translation
metaDescription: Use WanderVox in Thailand to translate Thai speech, signs, menus, street food notes, taxi cards, and travel phrases with cultural context.
